items.description: Disabled vehicle on I-76 eastbound between .8 miles west of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE and .2 miles west of Exit 341: MONTGOMERY DR/WEST RIVER DRIVE. There is a lane restriction.
